        About this item

        • MODERN ATHLETIC SLIM FIT – Elevate your wardrobe with this BYLT Drop-Cut Basic Men's T-Shirt, designed with a modern tapered silhouette and elongated drop-cut hem for a clean, athletic look. This tee features a slim, fitted style that contours closer to the body for a sleek appearance. For a more relaxed fit, consider sizing up.
        • ULTRA-SOFT PERFORMANCE FABRIC – Made with our Signature Blend of 67% Polyester, 28% Cotton, 5% Spandex, this mens soft t shirt delivers a breathable, comfortable feel with natural moisture-wicking and 4-way stretch. Engineered for flexibility, this longline t-shirt for men moves with you, providing enhanced breathability and ultra-stretch for all-day ease.
        • MOISTURE-WICKING & WRINKLE RESISTANT – Stay dry and sharp all day. This plain t shirt for men resists wrinkles and pulls moisture away from the body, making it ideal for work, travel, or everyday wear. Out athletic shirts are shrink-proof, and fade-resistant, ensuring a crisp, fresh look wear after wear.
        • VERSATILE LONG T SHIRT FOR MEN – Designed with a modern longline silhouette and tailored slim fit, this elevated basic delivers a sleek, contemporary look for everyday wear. Fits closer to the body and may run small for some customers, so sizing up is recommended if you prefer a looser fit. Pairs effortlessly with jeans, joggers, jackets, or hoodies for versatile styling.
        • EASY CARE ESSENTIAL – This classic tee for men is machine washable, holds its shape, maintains color, resists shrinking, and holds up wash after wash. Tumble dry low and cool iron if needed for long-lasting wear.

        How customer reviews and ratings work

        Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

        To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

        Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
        Sponsored

        Customers say

        Customers love the t-shirt's fit, particularly how it's fitted on the arms, and appreciate its high-quality construction and comfortable feel. The material receives positive feedback, with one customer noting it holds up well after multiple washesings. While some customers find it true to size, others mention it runs much smaller than expected. The fabric thickness draws mixed reactions, with several noting it's thicker than average cotton shirts, and durability is also mixed, with some finding it durable while others report it easily stains.

        Amazon Customer
        5 out of 5 stars
        Excellent Fitted Shirt from BYLT
        I was skeptical, but this shirt lives up to the hype. Highlights and accentuates positive features, while downplaying the gut. I'm a converted fan and will likely end up adding more pieces to my wardrobe in the near future here. The one thing about this look is the drop-cut is probably not for everyone, and makes me feel like I should be rocking a Zuck chain. The good news is I'm young looking enough to pull it off. And for those reasons, I'm in.

        Top reviews from the United States

        • Jennifer Miranda
          5 out of 5 stars
          Excellent Quality - Tru to Size
          Reviewed in the United States on June 21, 2026
          Size: X-LargeColor: Black
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          These BYLT Drop-Cut shirts are soft, comfortable, and have the perfect amount of stretch. The slim fit is flattering without being too tight, and the drop-cut hem gives them a modern look. They stay looking sharp throughout the day and resist wrinkles well. Great with jeans or layered under a jacket. The quality exceeded my expectations, and I’ll definitely be buying more colors. This go around I purchased the black and navy. The size chart is pretty accurate but remember these are a slimmer type of fit. My husband wears a large most days but I got these an XL for summer and he love the fit. These also dry well too without wrinkles - overall a perfect buy.

          4 out of 5 stars
          Runs small!!
          Reviewed in the United States on December 20, 2025
          Size: X-LargeColor: Black
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          Runs small!! Nice feeling shirt and perfect thickness for a t-shirt. I wear a L or XL in t-shirts (depending on brand). I own 3 pair of BLYT pants and their pants run a tad bit big for me. This is my first BYLT shirt and I ordered a XL. It fit like a Med. I bet the XXL runs small too, so I’m just returning this shirt and sticking with other brands.

        • Amanda
          1 out of 5 stars
          Don’t bother. Find another better brand.
          Reviewed in the United States on January 23, 2025
          Size: X-LargeColor: Black
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          Second shirt I’m returning. Size runs two small. All I wear is XL and this fits like a medium. I was so excited to get my first BYLT shirt. Returning this XL to go up two sizes. Didn’t expect a highly talked about brand would make their customers not feel so good going two sizes bigger.

          Ordered 3XL because XL was a body suit and this was MASSIVE. It was also already falling apart.

          Moving on to a different brand and wont try again.

          Read moreRead less

        Product Summary: BYLT Mens Drop-Cut Men's T Shirt, Slim Fit Plain Tshirts for Men, Drop Cut Basic Crewneck Tee, Wrinkle Resistant, Stretch Fit

        From BYLT

        4.3 out of 5 stars, 340 ratings

        Customer reviews

        200+ bought in past month

        Price

        One-time purchase: $35.00

        Purchasing options

        Other sellers

        Other sellers

        About this Item

        • MODERN ATHLETIC SLIM FIT – Elevate your wardrobe with this BYLT Drop-Cut Basic Men's T-Shirt, designed with a modern tapered silhouette and elongated drop-cut hem for a clean, athletic look. This tee features a slim, fitted style that contours closer to the body for a sleek appearance. For a more relaxed fit, consider sizing up.
        • ULTRA-SOFT PERFORMANCE FABRIC – Made with our Signature Blend of 67% Polyester, 28% Cotton, 5% Spandex, this mens soft t shirt delivers a breathable, comfortable feel with natural moisture-wicking and 4-way stretch. Engineered for flexibility, this longline t-shirt for men moves with you, providing enhanced breathability and ultra-stretch for all-day ease.
        • MOISTURE-WICKING & WRINKLE RESISTANT – Stay dry and sharp all day. This plain t shirt for men resists wrinkles and pulls moisture away from the body, making it ideal for work, travel, or everyday wear. Out athletic shirts are shrink-proof, and fade-resistant, ensuring a crisp, fresh look wear after wear.
        • VERSATILE LONG T SHIRT FOR MEN – Designed with a modern longline silhouette and tailored slim fit, this elevated basic delivers a sleek, contemporary look for everyday wear. Fits closer to the body and may run small for some customers, so sizing up is recommended if you prefer a looser fit. Pairs effortlessly with jeans, joggers, jackets, or hoodies for versatile styling.
        • EASY CARE ESSENTIAL – This classic tee for men is machine washable, holds its shape, maintains color, resists shrinking, and holds up wash after wash. Tumble dry low and cool iron if needed for long-lasting wear.

        Product Description

        Elevate your everyday look with this drop-cut basic men's t-shirt. Designed with a tapered fit, elongated hem, and 4-way stretch, it delivers comfort and style in one. Made from a soft cotton blend, this moisture-wicking, wrinkle-resistant tee keeps you dry and fresh all day. It’s a versatile, easy-care essential you’ll wear on repeat.
